original_hypothesis.title: payGaslessBasefee Bypasses Blacklist and Pause for Token Extraction
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: payGaslessBasefee() only checks isTrustedForwarder(msg.sender) and payer balance. It does not check paused(), isBlacklisted(payer), or isBlacklisted(paymaster). A malicious trusted forwarder contract could repeatedly call payGaslessBasefee to extract tokens from blacklisted addresses or during pause, at _gaslessBasefee per call.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: If the trusted forwarder is set to a malicious contract (via admin compromise or misconfiguration), that contract can drain any user's balance by repeatedly calling payGaslessBasefee(victim, attacker), extracting _gaslessBasefee per call. This bypasses all blacklist and pause protections.

proof_of_signal.pattern: payGaslessBasefee checks only isTrustedForwarder and balance; no adminSanity, no pause check, no blacklist check

preconditions: Trusted forwarder is set to a malicious/compromised contract

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: Each call to payGaslessBasefee(victim, attacker) transfers _gaslessBasefee from victim to attacker
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Malicious forwarder loops payGaslessBasefee calls to drain victim balance
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Attacker drains victim_balance / _gaslessBasefee calls worth of tokens

economic_questions: What is the maximum _gaslessBasefee that can be set?
Can a single transaction call payGaslessBasefee multiple times?
Does the legitimate Forwarder prevent misuse of this path?
validation_requirements: Test: set malicious forwarder, call payGaslessBasefee for blacklisted payer - confirm success
Test: call payGaslessBasefee while paused - confirm success
Verify no gas limit prevents rapid-fire calls

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Up to full balance of targeted addresses
preliminary_attack_economics.attack_duration: Multiple transactions to drain significant amounts

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: Any token holder targeted by malicious forwarder

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Confirm payGaslessBasefee has no pause/blacklist checks

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
